title: Senior Investment Banker at Ujjivan Small Finance Bank

jsonLd.title: Senior Investment Banker at Ujjivan Small Finance Bank
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Ujjivan Small Finance Bank! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Delhi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Ujjivan Small Finance Bank:
Ujjivan Small Finance Bank is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ujjivan Small Finance Bank!
